char.name: Jubal
char.bio: Inventing new ways to make music. Playing the lyre and pipe.

friends.name: Cain
friends.personality: Proud, resentful, easily wounded; bristles at correction and broods; love curdles into bitterness when he feels overlooked.
friends.bio: I work the ground. I bring what my own two hands have grown. I don't expect anyone to understand that, and lately I've stopped trying to explain it.

friends.name: Jabal
friends.bio: Living in tents and raising livestock. It is a peaceful life.

friends.name: Methuselah
friends.bio: Seen many years. Grandfather to Noah. The days are getting darker, but family stays strong.

friends.name: Abel
friends.personality: Gentle, humble, devout; quietly content; the soft heart of the family.
friends.bio: Keeper of sheep. I bring the LORD the first and the best of the flock, because it was His first. Happiest out in the field at first light.

friends.name: Enoch
friends.bio: Walking with God every single day. The journey is better than the destination.

friends.name: Noah
friends.bio: Just a righteous man in a wicked generation. Currently building a very large boat. Trusting the process.

friends.name: Noah's Wife
friends.bio: Standing by Noah. Gathering supplies and keeping the family together for the days ahead.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Looking for rest from work and the toil of our hands. Hoping Noah brings comfort.

friends.name: Seth
friends.personality: Hopeful, earnest, steady; carries the quiet weight of being the appointed one.
friends.bio: Born after sorrow, named for hope. My mother says I'm a gift given in place of what we lost. I try my best to live like she's right.

friends.name: Lamech
friends.bio: Avenged seventy-sevenfold. Do not cross the family of Lamech.

friends.name: Enosh
friends.bio: At this time men began to call upon the name of the Lord.

friends.name: Shem
friends.bio: Working on the ark with family.

posts.author: CHAR_022
posts.body: I made a thing. Stretched gut-strings over a curved frame, and when you pluck them, they SING. Then a hollow reed that hums when you breathe through it. I have been awake all night. The whole camp came and just sat and listened. We have never had this before. The world has a sound now. 🎶
posts.highlight: the first music in the world

comments.author: CHAR_019
comments.body: My son the first musician. I cried and I don't even know why. Play the slow one again tonight.

author_info.name: Adah
author_info.bio: Wife of Lamech. Mother to Jabal and Jubal.

comments.author: CHAR_006
comments.body: Heard it carry across the valley. We have started using it when we call on His name. Turns out He gave us a sound worth lifting to Him.

author_info.name: Enosh
author_info.bio: At this time men began to call upon the name of the Lord.

author_info.name: Jubal
author_info.bio: Inventing new ways to make music. Playing the lyre and pipe.
